title: Donut Labs Responds to Critics
description:
There has been a frenzy of response to Donut Labs’ announcement of the world’s first solid-state battery. Donut Labs produced a response video to critics. The video says everyone jumped the shark, and independent testing is coming. It drops hints all over the place. It tells their strategy and why ... [continued]

The post Donut Labs Responds to Critics appeared first on CleanTechnica.
